title: The Fountain Of Second Youth.
content:
Trust me, 'tis not a mere tale, the fountain of youth really runneth,
    Runneth forever. Thou ask'st, where? In the poet's sweet art!
meaning:
"The Fountain Of Second Youth." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
